title: Crispy Cantonese Toast
description: A simple Cantonese-style toast dish with a crispy twist.
instructions: 1. Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a pan over medium heat.
2. Cook the Cantonese-style bread until it's crispy and golden brown, about 2-3 minutes per side.
3. In a separate pan, scramble the eggs over medium heat until they're cooked through.
4. Add the chopped green onions and crispy fried shallots to the pan with the scrambled eggs and stir to combine.
5. Brush the cooked bread with the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil.
6. Assemble the toast by spreading the scrambled egg mixture on top of the bread.
7. Drizzle the soy sauce over the egg mixture.
